document.title: MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING
document.party1Address: Registered Office: 127, 4th Cross, 1st Main, ST BED area, Koramangala, Karnataka – 560034
document.section1Content: This Memorandum of Understanding ("MOU") is entered into between EzeeHealth and the Hospital for the purpose of establishing a collaborative framework for patient referrals. EzeeHealth operates a digital platform ("EzeeHealth BridgeCare") that facilitates connections between partner hospitals/clinics and super-specialty hospitals for patient referrals and care coordination.
document.section2Content: This MOU shall be effective from the date of signing and shall remain in force for a period of one (1) year, unless terminated earlier by either party with thirty (30) days' written notice. The MOU shall be automatically renewed for successive one-year periods unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least thirty (30) days prior to the expiration of the then-current term.
document.section3Item1: Provide access to the EzeeHealth BridgeCare digital platform for managing patient referrals
document.section3Item2: Facilitate connections with super-specialty hospitals in the EzeeHealth network
document.section3Item3: Provide training and technical support for using the platform
document.section3Item4: Ensure secure handling of patient data in compliance with applicable laws
document.section3Item5: Process and disburse professional fees in a timely manner
document.section4Item1: Ensure accurate and complete patient information is provided during referrals
document.section4Item2: Maintain valid medical registrations and licenses
document.section4Item3: Follow the referral protocols established by EzeeHealth
document.section4Item4: Ensure patient consent is obtained before sharing medical records
document.section4Item5: Cooperate with EzeeHealth for quality assurance and audit purposes
document.section5Content: EzeeHealth shall pay the Hospital a professional fee for each successful patient referral as mutually agreed. Payment shall be processed within thirty (30) days of receiving the billing confirmation from the super-specialty hospital. All payments will be made via bank transfer to the account details provided by the Hospital.
document.section6Content: Both parties agree to maintain strict confidentiality of all patient information, business terms, and proprietary information shared during the course of this arrangement. This obligation shall survive the termination of this MOU.
document.section7Content: Both parties shall comply with all applicable data protection and privacy laws, including but not limited to the Information Technology Act, 2000, and the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023. Patient data shall be handled with utmost care and used solely for the purpose of patient referral and care coordination.
document.section8Content: Either party may terminate this MOU by providing thirty (30) days' written notice to the other party. In the event of a material breach by either party, the non-breaching party may terminate this MOU immediately upon written notice. Upon termination, all pending referrals shall be completed, and outstanding payments shall be settled within sixty (60) days.
document.section9Content: Any disputes arising out of or in connection with this MOU shall be resolved through mutual consultation and negotiation. If the dispute cannot be resolved amicably within thirty (30) days, it shall be referred to arbitration in Bangalore, Karnataka, in accordance with the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996.
document.section10Content: This MOU shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. The courts of Bangalore, Karnataka shall have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising from this MOU.
document.section11Item1: This MOU constitutes the entire understanding between the parties regarding the subject matter herein.
document.section11Item2: No amendment or modification shall be valid unless made in writing and signed by both parties.
document.section11Item3: Neither party may assign its rights or obligations under this MOU without the prior written consent of the other party.
document.section11Item4: If any provision of this MOU is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
